title: [Warning] Notice: DGS Marine Group SA / The European & Overseas P&I Insurance
text: The Financial Market Authority Liechtenstein (FMA) advises that information available on websites which led to the communication dated 23 July 2012 concerning DGS Marine Group SA (Schaan) and The British European & Overseas P&I Insurance have been adjusted.   However, the FMA points out that still both companies have no license by the FMA Liechtenstein to conduct insurance business or provide insurance intermediary services in or out of Liechtenstein.
